title: caladenia bicalliata subsp. cleistogama
intro: Caladenia bicalliata subsp. cleistogama, also known as the cleistogamous pink spider orchid, is a rare and unique subspecies of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The cleistogamous pink spider orchid has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive function, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the Caladenia bicalliata subsp. cleistogama plant are typically made by infusing the roots and leaves in hot water or by using it as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
